channel.title: The VENCAst
channel.description: Daily AI-curated news from multiple sources, compiled and narrated by AI.
channel.itunes:author: News Pipeline

item.title: The VENCAst — April 04, 2026
item.description: Tensions in the Persian Gulf escalate further with a downed US aircraft and presidential threats. Ukraine reports an improved frontline despite extensive Russian air attacks, and a significant US defense budget increase is proposed amidst global econ...

item.title: The VENCAst — April 03, 2026
item.description: US-Israeli strikes intensify in Iran, driving global oil prices sharply higher. Europe grapples with new digital border delays, and a critical cybersecurity vulnerability has been discovered in Nvidia GPUs.

item.title: The VENCAst — April 02, 2026
item.description: From Washington to the Moon, global events continue to shape our world. US President Trump signals the nearing completion of military objectives in Iran while threatening a NATO withdrawal. Meanwhile, NASA's Artemis II mission has successfully launch...
